issues.message: English has 'the judge' but Greek lacks ὁ κριτής — intentional?

lexical_suggestions.query: When he saw them he turned and started back into the room but Toadvine seized him about the neck and rode him to the floor and held him by the hair and began to pry out an eyeball with his thumb

lexical_suggestions.query: There were horses tethered in the lot and there was a flatbed wagon against the fence with some turkeys sitting on the edge looking out
